Fed's Collins: Tariffs will push up inflation pressures.

news.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) reported its first-quarter FY24 results with revenue rising 8% year-on-year to $45.3 billion. Net revenue was $46.0 billion, beating consensus expectations. Consumer & Community Banking revenue was $18.3 billion (up 4% Y/Y), while Commercial & Investment Bank revenue was $19.7 billion (up 12% Y/Y). Investment Banking revenue grew 2% to $2.3 billion, with fees up 12% to $2.2 billion. Asset and Wealth Management revenue was $5.73 billion (up 12% Y/Y). Corporate revenue reached $2.30 billion (up 5% Y/Y). Assets under management were $4.1 trillion, with client assets at $6.0 trillion (up 15%). Net interest income increased 1% year over year to $23.4 billion, with interest income excluding Markets at $22.6 billion (down 2% Y/Y). The stock initially rose premarket but ended up trading in the red.
news.headline: JPMorgan Chase CEO cautions against tariffs/trade wars. Q1 FY24 results: revenue up 8% Y/Y to $45.3 billion. CCB revenue $18.3 billion, CIB revenue $19.7 billion. AUM $4.1 trillion, client assets $6.0 trillion (up 15%). Net interest income up 1% Y/Y to $23.4 billion. Market levels, net inflows driving growth.
Fed's Collins: The bigger the tariff, the larger the economic impact.
Fed's Collins: We came into first quarter with solid economic conditions - Yahoo.

news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached 1.5 million worldwide, with a death toll surpassing 100,000. The United States continues to have the highest number of cases, with over 400,000 confirmed infections and more than 15,000 deaths. In response to the escalating crisis, countries around the globe are implementing strict measures to curb the spread of the virus, including lockdowns and travel restrictions. Meanwhile, healthcare systems are facing immense pressure as they struggle to cope with the growing number of patients. Efforts to develop a vaccine are underway, but experts caution that it may still be months away from being widely available. The economic impact of the pandemic is also being keenly felt, with businesses closing and millions of people losing their jobs. Amidst these challenging times, the importance of following guidelines set out by health authorities cannot be overstated in order to mitigate the further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Energy costs caused surprise drop in US producer prices, falling unexpectedly.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) released its fourteenth annual Sustainability Report, continuing its role as a sustainability pioneer. The 2024 report introduced the company's 2030 Sustainability Goals, outlining objectives for environmental and social initiatives. These goals will drive Kilroy's sustainability agenda for the next five years. Alongside this, the company highlighted various recent accomplishments, emphasizing its commitment to sustainable practices.
news.headline: Kilroy Realty releases 14th Sustainability Report, sets 2030 Goals to guide efforts for next 5 years.

news.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) announced a first-quarter net income of $4.89 billion in 2025, marking a 6% increase compared to the previous year. The bank surpassed expectations with a GAAP EPS of $1.39, exceeding the consensus of $1.34. Despite beating earnings estimates, revenue saw a decline of 3% year over year, totaling $20.15 billion. Analysts had projected revenue to reach $20.75 billion, falling short of the actual figure. Net interest income for the U.S. banking giant dropped by 6% year over year to $11.49 billion, attributed to the impact of lower interest rates on various assets, deposit changes, pricing adjustments, reduced loan balances, and mitigated by decreased market funding. Noninterest income remained steady at $8.65 billion, inclusive of gains from selling commercial non-agency third-party servicing business and heightened asset-based fees in Wealth and Investment Management.
news.headline: Wells Fargo reports $4.89B net income in Q1 2025, up 6% YoY, beating EPS consensus. Revenue falls 3% to $20.15B.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS) is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings before the opening bell on Monday, April 14. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $12.35 per share, a rise from $11.58 per share reported in the same period last year. The bank is expected to announce quarterly revenue of $14.81 billion, compared to $14.21 billion in the previous year. Analyst Devin Ryan of JMP Securities recently affirmed a Market Outperform rating for Goldman Sachs but revised the price target down to $600 from $625. Investors are showing interest in the company's dividends, with Goldman Sachs offering an annual dividend yield of 2.45%, translating to a quarterly dividend of $3.00 per share. Read more on the Benzinga Pro platform for the full article.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs to report Q1 earnings of $12.35 per share on $14.81 billion revenue, with a 2.45% dividend yield.

news.summary: The US sustainable aviation fuel market is projected to grow significantly, reaching USD 6.97 billion in 2030 from USD 0.86 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 46.8%. This growth is driven by factors such as increased concerns about carbon emissions leading to a shift towards alternative fuels, the government's commitment to emissions reduction through tax credits, and airlines like United Air, KLM, and JetBlue already incorporating sustainable aviation fuel in their operations. In 2024, biofuels were the leading segment in the market, with major players including World Energy, Fulcrum BioEnergy, Gevo, Red Rock Biofuels, WasteFuel, and Prometheus Fuels. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US Sustainable Aviation Fuel Market projected to grow from $0.86 billion in 2024 to $6.97 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 46.8%.

news.summary: The implementation of new tariffs is anticipated to result in increased prices for vehicles and car parts, potentially leading to a rise in premiums by up to 16%. Customers are advised to consider various strategies to mitigate these higher costs.
news.headline: Tariffs may lead to a 16% increase in car insurance as vehicle and parts prices rise. Tips to manage expenses available.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, PetMed Express, Inc. (NASDAQ: PETS), a leading consumer pet healthcare company catering to dogs, cats, and horses for almost three decades, will commemorate National Pet Day by ringing the Nasdaq Opening Bell.
news.headline: PetMeds® to celebrate National Pet Day by ringing Nasdaq Opening Bell on April 11, 2025 - serving pets for 30 years.

news.summary: Blaqclouds, Inc. has recently introduced a new initiative called ZEUSxPay, a bulk email marketing campaign aimed at promoting the “With Crypto” brand ecosystem. This campaign is expected to reach a wide audience, with an estimated distribution of over 100,000 emails. The goal of this marketing strategy is to raise awareness about the brand and engage customers by offering information and incentives related to cryptocurrency usage. With the growing popularity of cryptocurrency, Blaqclouds, Inc. hopes to attract new users and establish a stronger presence in the market. This campaign marks a significant step for the company as it expands its reach and diversifies its promotional efforts.
news.headline: Blaqclouds, Inc. launches ZEUSxPay campaign to promote "With Crypto" brand ecosystem through bulk email marketing.

news.summary: In Bowie, MD, on April 11, 2025, Blink Charging Co. (Nasdaq: BLNK) disclosed receiving a letter from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on April 10, 2025. The letter indicated that Blink has regained compliance with Nasdaq's periodic filing requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). Blink Charging Co. is a prominent global entity specializing in electric vehicle charging equipment and services.
news.headline: Blink Charging Co. complies with Nasdaq filing rule, confirmed via letter received on Apr. 10, 2025.

news.summary: In Glyfada, Greece, on April 11, 2025, United Maritime Corporation (NASDAQ: USEA) revealed that its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, has been officially submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Interested parties can now obtain the Annual Report via the company's website, www.unitedmaritime.gr, specifically under the "Investors" segment titled "Annual Reports."
news.headline: United Maritime has released its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F accessible on its website. NASDAQ: USEA.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, Scilex Holding Company (Nasdaq: SCLX) based in Palo Alto, California, disclosed its plans for a reverse stock split. The innovative company, dedicated to developing non-opioid pain management products for acute and chronic pain, is establishing a joint venture with IPMC Company to expand into neurodegenerative and cardiometabolic disease treatment. The reverse stock split will consolidate outstanding shares at a ratio of 1-for-35, becoming effective at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Scilex Holding Co. undergoes 1-for-35 reverse stock split on April 15, 2025, focusing on non-opioid pain products.

news.summary: A new report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8% in the month of July, which is a significant improvement from the previous month's rate of 5.4%. This decrease represents approximately 800,000 individuals who have found employment opportunities. Additionally, the report shows that the economy added 1.8 million jobs last month. These numbers reflect a positive trend towards economic recovery following the challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic.
news.headline: Eightco has successfully sold Fergueson Containers, Inc. to an undisclosed buyer.

news.summary: Dinosaur Safari is set to return to the Bronx Zoo, starting April 12. Visitors can interact with over 60 life-size animatronic dinosaurs and pterosaurs, some reaching 66 feet in length. This beloved tradition offers a unique opportunity to experience the prehistoric world that vanished millions of years ago. The exhibit aims to draw attention to these ancient species.
news.headline: Dinosaur Safari returns to Bronx Zoo with over 60 life-size animatronic dinosaurs and pterosaurs.Exciting adventure awaits!

news.summary: Protolabs (NYSE: PRLB) revealed plans to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Friday, May 2, 2025. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. Interested parties can join the call via a simultaneous webcast accessible through a provided link or by visiting the investor relations portion of the Protolabs website. To participate in the live call, dial 877-709-8150 within the U.S. or the relevant number for international participants.
news.headline: Protolabs to share Q1 2025 results on May 2, 2025, at 8:30 am EDT through conference call and webcast.

news.summary: Portugal's top energy company, Galp, partnered with U.S.-based global energy storage integrator, Powin, to commission and inject stored energy into the grid at Galp's largest solar power plant. The utility-scale battery energy storage system near Alcoutim, Algarve, has a capacity of 5 MW/20 MWh. This marks Powin's inaugural project in Europe, solidifying their collaborative venture as they join forces to bolster energy capabilities.
news.headline: Galp and Powin launch 5 MW/20 MWh battery system at Alcoutim Solar Park, Portugal's largest plant.

news.summary: Cloudflare Workers now allow developers to create secure global applications, enabling seamless connection to legacy clouds and on-premises networks.
news.headline: Cloudflare launches Workers VPC & VPC Private Link, enabling developers to build secure cross-cloud apps and connect globally.

news.summary: Salt Lake City-based company Degreed has recently announced the enhancement of its executive team in order to expedite advancements in AI-powered skills development. This strategic move aims to drive innovation within the company and propel growth. The new executive team members are expected to bring fresh perspectives and expertise to the table. This decision comes as Degreed continues to solidify its position as a leader in the industry. The company's focus on leveraging AI technology to enhance skills development highlights its commitment to staying at the forefront of the rapidly evolving market.
news.headline: Degreed boosts executive team in AI skills dev, Salt Lake City, aiming to innovate learning processes.

news.summary: Lock 8 Partners, LLC has officially closed its lower middle-market technology buy-out fund, Lock 8 Fund III LP, after surpassing its target with $182 million in investor commitments. The fund will focus on majority investments in B2B SaaS and tech-enabled services companies to enhance their growth potential. Lock 8, known for its deep sector expertise, received significant support for its strategy.
news.headline: Lock 8 Partners raise $182M for Fund III. Investing in B2B SaaS and tech-enabled services for growth.

news.summary: March saw a significant drop in producer input prices, more than anticipated, indicating a larger trend of slowing consumer inflation. The Producer Price Index (PPI) rose by 2.7% year-over-year, significantly lower than the previous 3.2%. This data, released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, fell short of economists' predictions of 3.3%. Monthly wholesale prices also decreased by 0.4% in March, contrasting with a slight increase of 0.1% in February. The decline was mainly due to a notable fall in goods prices, responsible for over 70% of the final demand index decrease. Final demand goods prices went down by 0.9% - the most significant drop noted.
news.headline: Producer inflation cools sharply in March as Producer Price Index (PPI) increases by 2.7% year-over-year, far below economists' forecast of 3.3%. Monthly wholesale prices fall by 0.4%, driven by goods prices.
Bloomberg.com reports on the latest numbers for Consumer Discretionary Sector & Industry Performance.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, NeoVolta Inc. (NASDAQ: NEOV), an American energy technology firm specializing in scalable storage solutions for residential and commercial power infrastructure, disclosed a partnership with Virtual Peaker, a prominent virtual power plant software company. This collaboration aims to boost grid resilience and quicken the uptake of distributed energy resources. Through Virtual Peaker's AI-driven platform, batteries are optimized as distributed energy resources (DERs) to enhance energy savings and bolster grid reliability.
news.headline: NeoVolta and Virtual Peaker team up to improve grid resilience through smarter energy storage integration.

news.summary: A report titled "Industrial Safety Gloves Market - Focused Insights 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for Industrial Safety Gloves was worth USD 7.14 billion in 2024 and is estimated to hit USD 9.34 billion by 2030, with a growth rate of 4.58% CAGR. The global market report covers data on 34 vendors and shows that the industry is fragmented with numerous key players.
news.headline: Industrial Safety Gloves Market expected to reach USD 9.34 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 4.58%, valued at USD 7.14 billion in 2024.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. (IPA) (NASDAQ: IPA) has expressed firm backing for the U.S. Food and Drug Administration’s (FDA) move to gradually eliminate animal testing mandates for monoclonal antibodies and other pharmaceuticals. This transition by the FDA is a notable step forward in regulatory updates and closely resonates with ImmunoPrecise’s objective of transforming drug discovery and development.
news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies supports FDA's move to phase out animal testing for biotherapeutics, aligning with their AI-driven platform.

news.summary: Fortuna Mining Corp. has announced the sale of its stake in Roxgold Sanu SA, which includes the Yaramoko Mine and three Burkina Faso subsidiaries, to Soleil Resources International Limited. The definitive share purchase agreement marks the exit of Fortuna from Burkina Faso as SRI, a private Mauritius company, takes over the Acquired Companies. SRI, currently operating three mines, holding exploration permits, and owning a drilling company in Burkina Faso, will now have ownership of the Yaramoko Mine and the other entities. This transaction signifies Fortuna’s complete withdrawal from operations in Burkina Faso.
news.headline: Fortuna sells Yaramoko Mine in Burkina Faso to Soleil Resources International; ceasing operations in country.

news.summary: ECI Software Solutions, a leading global provider of cloud-based business management software, has recently acquired Davisware LLC. Davisware is known for offering comprehensive business management solutions tailored for field service organizations. This acquisition marks ECI's expansion into industries such as commercial food equipment, commercial HVAC & refrigeration, petroleum equipment, and overhead garage doors across North America. This strategic move aims to strengthen ECI's presence in these sectors and enhance its offerings in the region.
news.headline: ECI Software Solutions acquires Davisware to enhance field service management. Expansion in key industries across North America.
India Foreign Minister Goyal: India is not encouraging investment from China.

news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones Index surged following news of Trump's tariff decision. JPMorgan and Nvidia shares saw a significant increase in value on the stock exchange today. The turnaround in Dow Jones futures reflects the positive response to the latest development. JPMorgan and Nvidia experienced a notable rally, showcasing strong performance in the market. This update underscores the impact of current events on market trends and stock performance.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures rebound post-Trump tariff news; JPMorgan, Nvidia stocks surge in today's market.

news.summary: The stock market futures saw a rise as Treasury bond yields retreated from concerning levels. JPMorgan exceeded expectations. There are two significant inflation reports on the horizon. Dow Jones Futures are experiencing volatility amidst worries about yields and the strengthening dollar. JPMorgan's positive performance contrasts with these concerns, while investors await the upcoming inflation data.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise as JPMorgan beats views. Treasury yields stabilize, inflation reports pending.

news.summary: The purchase will result in the establishment of a cutting-edge operating system integrated with Applied Artificial Intelligence, aimed at enhancing profits for investors, advisors, and operators of tangible assets. It marks a strategic move towards leveraging technology for optimizing returns in the real assets sector.
news.headline: Intapp to acquire TermSheet, creating advanced operating system with Applied AI for real assets industry.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 11, 2025, Leviathan Gold Ltd. successfully closed a non-brokered private placement. The company sold a total of 32,500,000 units, priced at $0.10 each, resulting in gross proceeds of $3,250,000. This transaction was completed under the stock symbols LVX on the TSXV and 0GP on the German market.
news.headline: Leviathan Gold closes $3.25M private placement with 32.5M units; includes strategic investor Michael Gentile.

news.summary: Pharmaceutical company Conduit Pharmaceuticals has recently filed a patent for a new cocrystal formulation of VTAMA® (tapinarof). This novel formulation is expected to enhance the therapeutic benefits of the drug and expand its market opportunities. The move is aimed at tapping into a wider consumer base and potentially increasing revenue for the company. The patent filing signifies a significant development for Conduit Pharmaceuticals and underscores their commitment to innovation in the pharmaceutical industry.
news.headline: Conduit Pharma files patent for tapinarof cocrystal, enhancing therapeutic benefits with market extension prospects.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG) made an announcement in Houston regarding their participation in The Cell & Gene Meeting on The Mediterranean (Med) in Rome, Italy, from April 15-17, 2025. FibroBiologics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company known for developing therapeutics and potential cures for chronic diseases using fibroblasts and fibroblast-derived materials. They hold a significant number of patents, with over 240 issued and pending. Dr. Hamid Khoja, the Chief Scientific Officer of the company, will present on FibroBiologics’ unique fibroblast cell-based approach for treating chronic diseases during the conference, which serves as a premier gathering for the Advanced Therapy Medicinal Products sector in Europe and beyond.
news.headline: FibroBiologics to present at Cell & Gene Meeting in Rome, discussing fibroblast cell-based treatment of chronic diseases.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, the Board of Directors of CSW Industrials, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share for shareholders of record as of April 25, 2025. This amount marks a $0.03 increase per share from the previous quarter, reflecting a growth of about 12.5%. The dividend payout is scheduled for May 9, 2025.
news.headline: CSW Industrials boosts dividend by 12.5% to $0.27 per share from $0.24, payable on May 9, to holders on record by April 25.
